description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in historical or period attire, featuring a wide-brimmed hat with a band, a collared shirt with buttons, and a fitted jacket. The jacket is paired with knee-length breeches and stockings, with one stocking pulled up higher than the other. The figure's shoes are buckled and have a classic, old-fashioned design. The left arm is extended outward with the hand open, while the right arm is bent at the elbow, with the hand near the torso. The face is partially obscured by the hat, and the overall appearance suggests a character from a past century, possibly a townsperson or traveler.
description: An adult male in period clothing with a wide-brimmed hat, collared shirt, jacket, breeches, stockings, and buckled shoes, posed with one arm extended.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open left hand, detailed jacket, and the face partially shadowed by the hat.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the hat, the extended left arm, and the side seam of the jacket and breeches.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the jacket, both stockings, and the hat's band, with the left arm raised outward.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the bent right arm, the side of the hat, and the profile of the breeches and shoes.
attribute_clothing_type: historical collared shirt, fitted jacket, knee-length breeches, stockings, wide-brimmed hat
attribute_posture: standing with left arm extended outward
attribute_hairstyle: short hair mostly covered by hat
